posts.label: Meme 1
posts.overlay_text: me planning our whole wedding after he texted 'good morning'
posts.fb_caption: One 'good morning' text and suddenly I've named our future kids. 😭 The daydream is free and I am SPENDING it. Tag the friend who does this too — what's the smallest thing that sent you spiraling into a full fantasy?

posts.label: Meme 2
posts.overlay_text: me reading the group chat rn
posts.fb_caption: Not my drama but I am fully invested. 🍿 The group chat has been ELECTRIC today. Tag your ride-or-die you'd live-text through this. Be honest: are you the popcorn friend or the peacemaker?

posts.label: Quote 1
posts.quote: You are the sky. Everything else is just the weather.
posts.fb_caption: Whatever storm you're in today — it's weather, not you. ☁️ You are the sky it all moves through. Save this for a hard day. What's one feeling you're letting pass through you right now?

posts.label: Quote 2
posts.quote: Talk to yourself like you would to someone you love.
posts.fb_caption: Would you speak to your best friend the way you speak to yourself? 💌 Let this be the week the inner voice gets kinder. Share this with someone who needs to hear it today.

posts.fb_caption: Five years of journaling and here's what it actually changes. 🤍 If you've been meaning to start, let this be your sign. (Credit: original creator — please confirm before posting.)
